code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut longest = ""
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if string.len(current) > string.len(longest)
      longest = current
    end
    current = ""
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if string.len(current) > string.len(longest)
  longest = current
end

println("longest=#{longest}")
